mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ai_operation_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(total_tokens), 0) FROM sys_ai_operation_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_tokens), 0) FROM sys_ai_operation_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(response_time), 0) FROM sys_ai_operation_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_ai_operation_log WHERE model IS NOT NULL AND model != '' GROUP BY model ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, tool_calls FROM sys_ai_operation_log WHERE tool_calls IS NOT NULL AND tool_calls != '' AND tool_calls != '[]'
SELECT operation_type AS operationType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_ai_operation_log WHERE operation_type IS NOT NULL AND operation_type != '' GROUP BY operation_type ORDER BY count DESC
